parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ prompt: 'Draft a ' + ($json.body.channel || 'linkedin_post') + ' for AICloudStrategist (Rajiv, 22-yr senior cloud architect, FinOps focus, Delhi/NCR; ICP: Indian SMB CTOs/Founders with cloud spend INR 5-50L/month).
